case_title: GANTZLER, TODD VS MAGICMAKER INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GANTZLER, TODD AS TO DEFENDANT MAGICMAKER INC. KRAUS, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAGICMAKER INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GANTZLER, TODD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGICMAKER INC. KRAUS, MICHELLE $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,855.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KRAUS, MICHELLE HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO CORRECT JUDGMENT OF JUN-16-1997, GRANTED
DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT KRAUS, MICHELE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. MAGICMAKER INC. REMAINS AS DECIDED ON 5/6/97.
THE MOVAC WAS ENTERED AS A MOGEN SO THAT THE JUDG- MENT OF MAY 6, 1997 IS NOT VACATED & REMAINS AS DECIDED EXCEPT AS TO DEFTS.SEE RULING ON MOTION.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAGICMAKER INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,369.32 AS TO DEFENDANT MAGICMAKER INC.
